storagePolicy.rule: Use optimized display assets in the wall; keep raw poster files out of the default browsing path when the archive grows.

posters.title: Shaun Soomro, DJ Serang

source.label: Resident Advisor
source.posterEvidenceStatus: RA flyer front image was downloaded locally for reference through the public indexed image link.

posters.notes: RA lists a far-dated September Shanghai TBA entry for Shaun Soomro and DJ Serang. Keep it for complete RA coverage and as a future watch/context item until venue, ticket route, age policy, and current update state are confirmed.

posters.title: Lucrecia Dalt 2026 China Tour
posters.sound: experimental electronic, art pop, ambient, avant-garde

source.label: ShowStart listing + Yuyintang/SO.READY WeChat screenshots
source.posterEvidenceSource: User-provided Lucrecia Dalt China tour poster and Yuyintang ticket-info screenshots, cross-checked against the public ShowStart event page.
source.posterEvidenceStatus: Tour poster names the Shanghai date and YuYintown Cube. ShowStart confirms 2026-07-16 20:30-22:00 at Yuyintang Music Park C Hall, address, Lucrecia Dalt, and 180/220 RMB ticket tiers. The WeChat ticket-info screenshot confirms Shanghai C Hall and ShowStart QR route but does not expose price/time in the visible crop.

posters.notes: SO.READY presents Lucrecia Dalt's first China tour Shanghai stop at Yuyintang Music Park C Hall. ShowStart confirms the July 16 20:30-22:00 timing, C Hall venue, address, artist, and 180/220 RMB ticket tiers; user-provided WeChat screenshots add the tour poster and Yuyintang ticket-info card.

posters.title: 2026 Shanghai Summer Music Festival (MISA)
posters.sound: classical crossover, jazz, film music, contemporary art

source.label: Shanghai Municipal Administration of Culture and Tourism
source.posterEvidenceSource: Shanghai Municipal Administration of Culture and Tourism
source.posterEvidenceStatus: Official 2026 MISA key visual is visible in the municipal culture article; local file saved after visual check. The image confirms the Music in the Summer Air branding and Jul 5-Jul 20 date window.

posters.notes: Shanghai city culture and official travel sources list the 2026 MISA season from Jul 5 to Jul 20 with 33 live performances plus online MISA. Keep as Watch: source confidence is now stronger, but the fit is culture-night/listening-first rather than rave, and ticket availability still belongs to individual program pages.

posters.title: Cooling Water
posters.sound: dark wave, trip-hop, experimental rock, jazz/R&B crossover

source.label: ShowStart listing + Yuyintang WeChat screenshots
source.posterEvidenceSource: User-provided Yuyintang poster and official-account article screenshots, cross-checked against the public ShowStart event page.
source.posterEvidenceStatus: Clean poster confirms Cooling Water, date, venue, address, artists, and ticket tiers. ShowStart confirms 2026-07-03 20:00-23:00, Yuyintang Music Park B Hall, lineup, address, ticket tiers, and no-refund purchase language. The article screenshot contains a visible 10.28 SAT ticket-block date conflict, so ShowStart and the clean poster are treated as the current practical sources.

posters.notes: Yuyintang B Hall live-electronic / experimental bill with Handycam, ABYSM, Tuihua Lichang, and Wu Xiaotian Erin. ShowStart confirms the July 3 20:00-23:00 timing, B Hall venue, address, lineup, and 98/128/158 RMB ticket tiers; the Yuyintang WeChat screenshots add the event poster and Chinese sound notes.

source.label: Sina / official Weibo mirror

posters.notes: Large Qiantan Sports Park pop festival with official ticket channels on Damai, Maoyan, and Ticket Planet. Date, venue, and pop lineup are now corroborated by multiple public rows; keep as Watch because the techno fit is low and live ticket inventory still needs platform recheck before any purchase CTA.
